---
description: "Update the experience calculator in main.js with a new join date"
argument-hint: "Enter the new join year and month (e.g., 2018 8)"
---

Update the experienceCalculator function in [main.js](assets/js/main.js) to use the provided join year and month instead of the hardcoded Aug 2018.

Modify the function to accept parameters or update the default values.

Ensure the calculation remains accurate for years and months since the join date.</content>
